description: SlimeWeb is a fast lightweight framework for python powered by rust

disabled_tests.static: no /static/<file> route; 404 on all static paths
disabled_tests.async-db: tags returned as JSON string rather than list (JSONB codec not registered)
disabled_tests.echo-ws: resp.send() JSON-encodes text messages; binary echo returns 0 bytes and crashes the server
disabled_tests.api-4: depends on async-db template, which is broken
disabled_tests.api-16: depends on async-db template, which is broken
